tagline: Publish with service principal credentials: Authors can now publish dashboards using the data credentials of a service principal.
what_it_does: Publish with service principal credentials: Authors can now publish dashboards using the data credentials of a service principal. Service principal draft view fix: Fixed a bug where a dashboard published via a service principal loses the ability to view draft. Text widget menu fix: Removed Show visualization query from the kebab menu on text widgets.
why_it_matters: Dataset field filters can also offer dashboard interactivity, more features, and better performance with large datasets than parameters.
plain_summary: Publish with service principal credentials: Authors can now publish dashboards using the data credentials of a service principal. Service principal draft view fix: Fixed a bug where a dashboard published via a service principal loses the ability to view draft.
